title: まっ、流行ってすぐ変わるし！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At the end of my day out with Tosen Jordan...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ughhh, I'm starving. Wanna get something to
eat?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Heeeyo, girlio!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Fancy some Italiano? There's a really kickin' place
nearby.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Itali...ano? Is that, like, good?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
For sure! Follow me! I'll show you a really
happening spot! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, this place has a cool vibe... Looks
expensive, though!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It's famous for its fantastic wines.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
They also have grape juice made from vineyard
grapes. Want to try some?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Bet! I love grapes! Ah, but the price is probably
outrageous...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ Well, there certainly are expensive
places, but...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The best part about Italiano is that, while it might
look fancy, a lot of restaurants are pretty
affordable and not super snobby.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
In other words, Italiano is hip for the modern
youth! ♪ So let's enjoy!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
For real? Italiano is awesome! Sounds like I've got
no choice but to stuff my face! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: The menu is on the wall over there. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Pizza, pasta... Seriously?! This is Italiano?! I know, like, all of this food!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Huh, you seem surprised... Did you not know
we've been talking about Italian food?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I'm stuffed! The pizza and the pasta were
both great!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Nice call, Maruzen!
choice_data_list: You know some good places, huh?
You know some good places, huh?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's nothing! I just know a thing or two about
what's trendy!

text_block_list.name: Restaurant Owner
text_block_list.text:
Haha, there was a time when we used to have TV
interviews day after day.

text_block_list.name: Restaurant Owner
text_block_list.text:
I think it's because we were so popular back in the
day that I'm able to take my time and focus on my
cooking now.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: That's right! Back in the...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Back in the day? What about now?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Jordan! Italiano is still super popular now, right?!
Obviously tiramisu must be!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Umm... I don't really knooow...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But it's all good as long as the food is bussin',
right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Also, the pic I uploaded to Umasta got a ton of
likes!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: That puts us, like, right on the forefront! It's like the times are catching up with Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: The times are catching up with me?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeaaah! That's exactly what it means! ☆
choice_data_list: Aren't we getting a little carried away?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Of course! Maruzen is love, after all!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! Great! Then I'm gonna keep running at
the forefront of all the trends!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Full speed ahead!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Tosen Jordan's assistance, the day is
saved!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? I don't think so. I just call it like I see it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Thanks, Jordan! Today was super far out!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing... Ah, why don't we take a selfie? I
wanna have something to remember this by!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yeah, for shizzle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, their selfie goes viral and the
"Italiano" restaurant suddenly becomes a hot
spot.
